meta.name: Waterproof Push Buttons
meta.description: Waterproof push buttons for outdoor use
meta.heroTitle: IP67 Waterproof Push Buttons for Outdoor Installations
meta.heroDescription:
IP67-rated low/high-voltage push buttons with Momentary (StopperPush) and Latching Key-to-Reset (StopperLatch) activation modes. Multi-functional signal electrical configuration.
Surface-mount design available in six housing and six button colours with function marking or custom labelling. Compatible with STI Universal Stopper for additional protection.
Designed for outdoor and moisture-prone environments requiring weather-resistant signalling and control.
